race.description: St John's Crisis Centre Qtis Jewel 3Yo
race.comment: Huge field and the top picks have drawn the car park. EARN TO BURN (2) went back then came wide and was very strong late but just came up short last start over 1000m at Eagle Farm. Better placed back out to 1200m - just needs luck slotting in to be right in the finish. FABULANTES (3) has come from last on the bend to win has last two, taking the short cut home two back then circling the field over 1350m at Doomben last time. Coming back to 1200m is the query but he will be flying home. FORGOTTEN SPIRIT (11) was jagged back from the outside gate then worked home well without threatening over 1000m at Eagle Farm recently. Needs the extra 200m and should be strong late. DRAGONNE ROUGE (9) is the map horse. Found 1000m a shade too sharp last time despite being well supported. Box seats from gate one and will be hard to hold out. Market watch on CALL DA VINCI (1) first-up. Placed in a Group 1 Atkins last season so he has the class to test this field.
